headlines.title: Putin-Xi talks revive stalled Russian gas pipeline as Iran war rattles energy markets
headlines.summary: Putin is expected to hold talks with Chinese leader Xi Jinping on Wednesday, with the long-stalled Power of Siberia 2 natural gas pipeline topping the agenda.

headlines.title: Another Trump victory: Republican Rep. Thomas Massie loses Kentucky primary
headlines.summary: President Donald Trump had targeted Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., for opposing GOP priorities.

headlines.title: Over 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers set to strike as wage talks break down, sending shares lower
headlines.summary: More than 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers will begin a strike on Thursday after wage negotiations between the company and its union broke down.

headlines.title: U.S. Treasurys are now firmly in the 'danger zone,' strategists say
headlines.summary: U.S. Treasurys are in a "danger zone" as surging long-term yields raise fears that sticky inflation could begin spilling over into equities, strategists said.

headlines.title: Alibaba reveals more powerful Zhenwu AI chip, new LLM
headlines.summary: Alibaba announced updates to its AI offerings, including a more powerful chip and a new large language model.

headlines.title: China confirms order for 200 Boeing planes, calls aviation key area for U.S. cooperation
headlines.summary: China has agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets, its first major order in nearly a decade, U.S. President Donald Trump said last week.

headlines.title: Software stocks stage 'mini' bull market. Some traders see more gains
headlines.summary: As semiconductor shares dragged down the Nasdaq-100 for a second day, quietly, software stocks appear to have found their groove.

headlines.title: Nvidia bulls mount uphill battle into earnings
headlines.summary: Call volume outpaced puts by more than double on Monday, though more calls were exchanged at the bid or below, meaning likely sold.

headlines.title: Warren Buffett teased to CNBC a ‘tiny purchase’ in March. Berkshire filing may have revealed it
headlines.summary: When asked in March whether Berkshire was still putting money to work, Buffett said the conglomerate had made "one tiny purchase."

headlines.title: Higher aluminum prices are powering one former Dow component. Here's how to buy for less
headlines.summary: Despite elevated aluminum production costs and shipment timing issues, Alcoa (AA) is strongly capitalizing on structurally higher prices.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts suggest these 3 stocks for their long-term prospects
headlines.summary: Robust spending and strong demand for AI infrastructure have reinforced analysts' confidence in several stocks after earnings season.

headlines.title: For better or worse, investors are living through Trump’s stock market. Here's why
headlines.summary: President Donald Trump has been considered the ultimate stock market president, overseeing an expansion to record highs as well as major declines.

headlines.title: Elon Musk ditched California, but the state will get a much-needed win from SpaceX’s IPO
headlines.summary: Elon Musk stormed out of the state and took the headquarters of SpaceX and Tesla with him. But many current and former employees still call it home.

headlines.title: Writing your own obituary can help you live a better life. Here’s how to get started.
headlines.summary: By summarizing the life you’ve lived so far and the life you want to have from now on, you add meaning and intentionality to your days.

headlines.title: Is RFK Jr.’s ‘carnivore diet’ healthy? Here’s what you need to know.
headlines.summary: There isn’t much high-quality research linking the carnivore diet with beneficial long-term health outcomes like eliminating visceral fat. People should know that.

headlines.title: Anthropic’s latest hire led AI at Tesla, worked at OpenAI and received high praise from Elon Musk
headlines.summary: Tesla’s former head of artificial intelligence, Andrej Karpathy, is joining Anthropic — while his old boss, Elon Musk, ties SpaceX more tightly to the AI startup.

headlines.title: My late mother’s bank account is $2,000 short. Can the bank legally refuse to provide her final statement?
headlines.summary: ‘I am the beneficiary on her checking account’

headlines.title: I’m selling my $1 million Maui home. Will my agent charge me less than a 6% commission?
